'''鈭歞-zh-ng''' ('''dazhanga''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:prechop|prechop]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-zh-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:prechop|prechop]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歞-zh-ng
|-
! Lemma
| dazhanga
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dazhangithi|dazhangithi]] || [[word:dazhangiji|dazhangiji]] || [[word:dazhangishi|dazhangishi]] || [[word:dazhangi|dazhangi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dazhanguthuth|dazhanguthuth]] || [[word:dazhangujuj|dazhangujuj]] || [[word:dazhangushush|dazhangushush]] || [[word:dazhang|dazhang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dazhanguthu|dazhanguthu]] || [[word:dazhanguju|dazhanguju]] || [[word:dazhangushu|dazhangushu]] || [[word:dazhangu|dazhangu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dazhangufuth|dazhangufuth]] || [[word:dazhangufuj|dazhangufuj]] || [[word:dazhangufush|dazhangufush]] || [[word:dazhanguf|dazhanguf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dazhangethe|dazhangethe]] || [[word:dazhangeje|dazhangeje]] || [[word:dazhangeshe|dazhangeshe]] || [[word:dazhange|dazhange]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dazhangothoth|dazhangothoth]] || [[word:dazhangojoj|dazhangojoj]] || [[word:dazhangoshosh|dazhangoshosh]] || [[word:dazhang|dazhang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dazhangotho|dazhangotho]] || [[word:dazhangojo|dazhangojo]] || [[word:dazhangosho|dazhangosho]] || [[word:dazhango|dazhango]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dazhangofoth|dazhangofoth]] || [[word:dazhangofoj|dazhangofoj]] || [[word:dazhangofosh|dazhangofosh]] || [[word:dazhangof|dazhangof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dazhang忙th忙|dazhang忙th忙]] || [[word:dazhang忙j忙|dazhang忙j忙]] || [[word:dazhang忙sh忙|dazhang忙sh忙]] || [[word:dazhang忙|dazhang忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dazhangathath|dazhangathath]] || [[word:dazhangajaj|dazhangajaj]] || [[word:dazhangashash|dazhangashash]] || [[word:dazhang|dazhang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dazhangatha|dazhangatha]] || [[word:dazhangaja|dazhangaja]] || [[word:dazhangasha|dazhangasha]] || [[word:dazhanga|dazhanga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dazhangafath|dazhangafath]] || [[word:dazhangafaj|dazhangafaj]] || [[word:dazhangafash|dazhangafash]] || [[word:dazhangaf|dazhangaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:dazhangasha|dazhangasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:godazhangasha|godazhangasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokidazhangasha|gokidazhangasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:dazhangn眉sha|dazhangn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:godazhangnkn眉sha|godazhangnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokidazhangn眉sha|gokidazhangn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dazhangsh毛sha|dazhangsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godazhangnksh毛sha|godazhangnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidazhangsh毛sha|gokidazhangsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dazhangrosha|dazhangrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:godazhangnkrosha|godazhangnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidazhangrosha|gokidazhangrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dazhangmusha|dazhangmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:godazhangnkmusha|godazhangnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidazhangmusha|gokidazhangmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:dazhangsherasha|dazhangsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:godazhangnksherasha|godazhangnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokidazhangsherasha|gokidazhangsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:dazhangasha|dazhangasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:godazhangnkngasha|godazhangnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokidazhangasha|gokidazhangasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dazhangyasha|dazhangyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:godazhangnkyasha|godazhangnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokidazhangyasha|gokidazhangyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:dazhangyamasha|dazhangyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:godazhangnkyamasha|godazhangnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokidazhangyamasha|gokidazhangyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:dazhangn眉sh毛sha|dazhangn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:godazhangnkn眉sh毛sha|godazhangnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokidazhangn眉sh毛sha|gokidazhangn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:dazhangn眉rosha|dazhangn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godazhangnkn眉rosha|godazhangnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidazhangn眉rosha|gokidazhangn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dazhangn眉musha|dazhangn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godazhangnkn眉musha|godazhangnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidazhangn眉musha|gokidazhangn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:dazhangsh毛n眉sha|dazhangsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:godazhangnksh毛n眉sha|godazhangnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokidazhangsh毛n眉sha|gokidazhangsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:dazhangsh毛rosha|dazhangsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godazhangnksh毛rosha|godazhangnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidazhangsh毛rosha|gokidazhangsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dazhangsh毛musha|dazhangsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godazhangnksh毛musha|godazhangnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidazhangsh毛musha|gokidazhangsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:dazhangron眉sha|dazhangron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:godazhangnkron眉sha|godazhangnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokidazhangron眉sha|gokidazhangron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:dazhangrosh毛sha|dazhangrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:godazhangnkrosh毛sha|godazhangnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokidazhangrosh毛sha|gokidazhangrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dazhangromusha|dazhangromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godazhangnkromusha|godazhangnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidazhangromusha|gokidazhangromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:dazhangmun眉sha|dazhangmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:godazhangnkmun眉sha|godazhangnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokidazhangmun眉sha|gokidazhangmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:dazhangmush毛sha|dazhangmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:godazhangnkmush毛sha|godazhangnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokidazhangmush毛sha|gokidazhangmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:dazhangmurosha|dazhangmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godazhangnkmurosha|godazhangnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidazhangmurosha|gokidazhangmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:dazhang|dazhang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:d忙zh忙ng|d忙zh忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hodazhang|hodazhang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hod忙zh忙ng|hod忙zh忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohodazhang|hohodazhang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohod忙zh忙ng|hohod忙zh忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉dazhang|n眉dazhang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉d忙zh忙ng|n眉d忙zh忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉dazhang|n眉n眉dazhang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉d忙zh忙ng|n眉n眉d忙zh忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂dazhang|n茂dazhang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂d忙zh忙ng|n茂d忙zh忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂dazhang|n茂n茂dazhang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂d忙zh忙ng|n茂n茂d忙zh忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:ludazhang|ludazhang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lud忙zh忙ng|lud忙zh忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luludazhang|luludazhang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulud忙zh忙ng|lulud忙zh忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lidazhang|lidazhang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lid忙zh忙ng|lid忙zh忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilidazhang|lilidazhang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilid忙zh忙ng|lilid忙zh忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kodazhang|kodazhang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kod忙zh忙ng|kod忙zh忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokodazhang|kokodazhang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokod忙zh忙ng|kokod忙zh忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kedazhang|kedazhang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ked忙zh忙ng|ked忙zh忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekedazhang|kekedazhang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:keked忙zh忙ng|keked忙zh忙ng]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|bfc4f79}}
